title: malvastrum humile
intro: Malvastrum humile, also known as dwarf mallow or bush mallow, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Malvastrum humile include relief from sore throats, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat fever. Malvastrum humile can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
